sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lau ke’n, tuuhonte, sihna pan hinna ah,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na khempeuh piang thei hi, um pah lel vaw!
Um pah lel vaw! Um pah lel vaw!
khempeuh piang thei hi, um pah lel vaw!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lau ke’n, tuuhonte, Topa ma pai
Nang hong cing Topa’n, na lam nawk zota;
Tui kha om khempeuh, Aman khumsak ding
Tuikha khempeuhte Aman dawn khinzo hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kong kikhak khempeuh, Topa’n hong zo veh!
Hong don khial ngei lo, hong kinusia
Khuamial, khuavak ah hong ompih khial ngei lo.
